title: Payhip Alternatives for Restricted Countries: Which Option Actually Works for You — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: PayPal and Stripe do not make their exclusion lists public. They do not send you a letter explaining why your country is blocked. You find out when your account gets flagged, your funds get held for 180 days, or your application is rejected with a generic error message. Gumroad has payout delays that stretch to 30 days for sellers in certain regions, and Payhip quietly limits withdrawal options based on geography. These are not edge cases — they are the designed experience for creators in Nigeria, Ghana, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Kenya, Ethiopia, and dozens of other countries. The solution is not a workaround. It is a different infrastructure stack entirely: crypto payments through NOWPayments, automated delivery, and a store that no platform can suspend because no platform owns it.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Let's break down the options. PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are the conventional platforms, but they come with geographic restrictions and KYC requirements. PayPal, for instance, is unavailable in many African and Middle Eastern countries. Stripe's coverage is limited in Africa and Asia. Gumroad and Payhip also have their own blocked countries. Crypto-native infrastructure, on the other hand, uses blockchain technology to bypass these restrictions. Unchained Commerce, for example, offers a Core Shop Engine ($49.99) with automated delivery and payment verification, eliminating the need for a payment processor account. The Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) adds frontend wallet integration and supports multiple cryptocurrencies. The Admin Dashboard ($29.99) provides transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics for full control.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Conventional platforms often exclude restricted countries due to regulatory concerns, banking limitations, and compliance with local laws. This leaves creators in these regions with limited options. Crypto-native solutions, however, leverage the decentralized nature of blockchain to bypass these restrictions. Unchained Commerce, for instance, allows creators to accept payments in over 300 cryptocurrencies, without the need for a buyer account or KYC verification. This opens up a global market, ensuring creators can sell their digital products regardless of their location.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Payment speed and fees vary between platforms. PayPal and Stripe offer fast transactions but may charge higher fees and require a local bank account. Gumroad and Payhip provide simpler fee structures but may have slower payout times. Crypto-native platforms like Unchained Commerce offer near-instant payment verification and automated delivery. While cryptocurrency transaction fees apply, there are no platform fees for receiving payments. The one-time product cost (starting at $49.99) provides lifetime access, making it a cost-effective choice for long-term use.
Unchained Commerce's crypto-native approach empowers creators in restricted countries.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation is crucial for a seamless selling experience. Conventional platforms like PayPal and Stripe often require manual intervention for certain tasks. Gumroad and Payhip offer some automation but may lack advanced features. Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine excels in this area, providing instant automated delivery for digital products. It verifies payments and generates PDF receipts without the need for manual input. This ensures creators can focus on their craft while the system handles the logistics.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

The right choice depends on your location and priorities. If you're in a restricted country, crypto-native solutions like Unchained Commerce offer the most comprehensive and accessible option. For those with access to conventional platforms, consider your specific needs. If you value control and automation, Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard ($29.99) provides detailed insights. If you want a simple, ready-to-go solution, the Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) includes everything with priority support and a deployment guide.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Instant payment verification and automated delivery streamline the selling process.
